scripts.mermaid:affected: cat affected-projects.json | jq -r '.[] | "-p " + .' > affected-args.txt && nx-mermaid-grapher -f graph.json $(cat affected-args.txt) --impact -o mermaid --raw
scripts.mermaid:affected:stats: cat affected-projects.json | jq -r '.[] | "-p " + .' > affected-args.txt && nx-mermaid-grapher -f graph.json $(cat affected-args.txt) --impact -o stats
